name: Ben Sidran
abstract: Ben Hirsh Sidran (born August 14, 1943) is an American jazz and rock keyboardist, producer, label owner, and music writer. Early in his career he was a member of the Steve Miller Band and is the father of Grammy-nominated musician, composer and performer Leo Sidran.

interviews.title: Ben Sidran interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 15, 2023

concerts.label: Kool-Newport Jazz Festival: There I Go, There I Go, There I Go - We Remember Eddie Jefferson

works_created.t: Se va, se va, se fué ("Going, going, gone")

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli
about_quotes.evidence: I played years ago with Richard Davis, Carl Allen, Buddy Montgomery and myself and Ben Sidran for Ricky Lee Jones.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, October 18, 2023 [interview 2 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee confirms being interviewed by Ben Sidran ('Oh yeah, that was my first recital as a singer') and discusses topics covered in that interview, but does not describe a personal or professional relationship with Ben Sidran beyond the interviewer-interviewee dynamic.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bley Carla — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie McLean
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] What about Talking Jazz with Ben Sidran? That was another extensive treatment. [INTERVIEWEE] Yeah, that was – I thought he did a pretty decent job of putting his book out.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie McLean — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Dobbins
about_quotes.evidence: I remember hearing a great radio show that Ben Sidran had ... he used to have a show called “Sidran on Record” where he interviewed all these jazz artists.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Dobbins interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rochester, New York, January 11, 2012

about_quotes.speaker: Mose Allison
about_quotes.evidence: Ben Sidran, in his liner notes, draws out the comparison between your methods of operation and Thelonious Monk’s methods of operations
about_quotes.doc_title: Mose Allison — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Mancuso
about_quotes.evidence: And then I did 1979, we did another thing and I brought other critics in. Ben Sidran and the Heath Brothers.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Mancuso interviewed by Monk Rowe, Buffalo, New York, October 10, 2013
